description_long: This sconce features a striking tri-arm design with three downward-facing green glass or metal shades, each supported by elegantly curved metallic arms. The central stem is a combination of dark bronze or black metal and a matching green accent, giving the fixture a cohesive and bold appearance. The shades are wide and dome-shaped, bordered by a metallic rim that matches the arms and central stem. At the top, a cylindrical mounting cup suggests secure attachment to a ceiling. The overall look is both functional and decorative, with a modern yet slightly retro aesthetic. The materials and finish suggest durability and a touch of sophistication, making it suitable for urban interiors or covered outdoor spaces.
description: A tri-arm sconce with green dome shades and dark metallic arms, featuring a modern yet retro design. The fixture is both decorative and functional, with a bold color scheme and sturdy construction.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three green dome shades and the central stem with its green accent.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the curvature of the arms and the symmetry of the shades.
description_view_2: Another angled view emphasizing the metallic rim and the even spacing of the three shades.
description_view_3: View from the opposite side, showing the same tri-arm structure and the mounting cup at the top.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a modern design with retro influences, characterized by bold green shades and sleek, curved metallic arms. Its geometric symmetry and color contrast evoke a mid-century modern or art deco style.
